results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_groupby_tuple_keys_handle_multiindex_uses_include_groups_false__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/pandas/tests/groupby/test_grouping.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def test_groupby_tuple_keys_handle_multiindex\\(self\\):(?P<body>.*?)(?:\\n\\s*def |\\Z)', source, flags=re.S)
    assert m is not None, "Expected to find 'test_groupby_tuple_keys_handle_multiindex' in /workspace/pandas/tests/groupby/test_grouping.py"

def test_groupby_tuple_keys_handle_multiindex_uses_include_groups_false__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/pandas/tests/groupby/test_grouping.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def test_groupby_tuple_keys_handle_multiindex\\(self\\):(?P<body>.*?)(?:\\n\\s*def |\\Z)', source, flags=re.S)
    body = m.group('body')
    assert 'include_groups=False' in body, "This test should pass include_groups=False to GroupBy.apply to avoid the DeprecationWarning about operating on grouping columns. Expected 'include_groups=False' within the body of test_groupby_tuple_keys_handle_multiindex."
